franchisor_identity.parent_chain: FSB Holdings, Inc. (DE) → FS Brands, Inc. (DE) → FirstService CAM Holdings, Inc. (DE) → FirstService Corporation (Ontario, Canada)
franchisor_identity.business_description: General contracting franchise specializing in structural reconstruction and emergency services (drying, cleaning, loss mitigation, mold remediation) for residential and commercial structures, primarily in the insurance restoration market.

fees.technology_fees_monthly_estimate: $750–$1,200+ (RMS $525, software support $75, Xactimate $105–$149, MS 365 $7–$43/user, QB $99, Mitigate up to $100, call center $38–$70+)

financing.terms: Up to 50% of franchise fee; 4-year, 7% APR; cross-default with FA

territory.encroachment_risk: High — national accounts, Emergency Services, Paul Davis National, M&A rights, alternative distribution

contract_terms.non_compete_post_term: 2 years within territory and other PDRI territories
contract_terms.dispute_resolution: Binding arbitration (PDRI internal system, franchisee arbitrators)

litigation.concluded_summary: Smith v. Paul Davis (IL 2013) — settled 2015, PDRI $20K contribution

item21_financial_statements.guarantee: FS Brands, Inc. guarantees PDRI obligations

training.duration: ~8 weeks total (3 wk online + 3 wk classroom + 2 wk field)

special_risks: Out-of-state arbitration — forum selected by Arbitration Committee
Personal guaranty — all shareholders/partners/members must guarantee

key_overrides.CA: Post-term non-compete may be unenforceable; liquidated damages may be unenforceable; general release void
key_overrides.HI: General release must exclude HI Franchise Investment Law claims
key_overrides.IL: IL law governs; venue outside IL void (arbitration outside IL permitted); cannot waive IL FDA
key_overrides.IN: IN Deceptive Franchise Practices Act applies
key_overrides.MD: General release does not release from MD law liability
key_overrides.MI: FMV compensation at non-renewal; 180-day non-renewal notice
key_overrides.MN: 90-day termination notice (60 to cure); 180-day non-renewal; no general release at renewal; no litigation outside MN; actual damages only
key_overrides.NY: Franchisee may terminate on any legal grounds (overrides Item 17(d))
key_overrides.ND: Arbitration outside ND may not be enforceable; non-compete may be unenforceable; no liquidated damages
key_overrides.RI: Venue must comply with RI Franchise Investment Act
key_overrides.SD: SD law governs; inconsistent provisions void
key_overrides.VA: Fees limited to disclosure; VA law governs termination
key_overrides.WA: Arbitration must be in WA; release void unless negotiated with independent counsel; transfer fees limited to reasonable costs; WA FIPA prevails
key_overrides.WI: WI Fair Dealership Law governs and supersedes inconsistent FA provisions

promoted_facts.franchisee_organization: Paul Davis FOA — Brady Chuckel, NEC President
promoted_facts.parent_ownership: FS Brands 97.18% owned by FS Property Services (U.S.) Inc.

unresolveds.description: Exhibit B-2 guarantee text image-only (page 137); fact confirmed from Item 21 text
Consolidated territory reporting in Item 19 distorts per-territory metrics
Multi-territory operators report populations exceeding 800K max — actual per-unit metrics unclear
Table 5 resale valuations include multi-franchise package deals inflating per-franchise price
